description: Letter from Zikri b. Hananel, from Alexandria, to ʿArūs b. Yosef, Fustat. Around 1080. The writer is about to travel to Mahdiya and Spain. He asks the addressee to send him power of attorney to deal with his goods that need to be send from Alexandria to Mahadiya. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #785) VMR
description_he: מכתב מזכרי בן חנאנאל, מאלכסנדריה, לערוס בן יוסף בפוסטאט, כ-1080, על נסיעה למהדייה וייפוי כוח
